rows.label: qev091202_MSG0001
rows.name: This is the new resource in question.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091202_MSG0002
rows.name: Man, I do not get this planet at all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091202_MSG0003
rows.name:
Life on Mira has been one first after the
next, but this is especially fascinating.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091202_MSG0004
rows.name:
If they're right about being able to use
this junk, it could be a huge boost.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091202_MSG0005
rows.name:
Agreed. My readings are off the charts. It
could spark the next technological revolution.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091202_MSG0006
rows.name: Niiiiice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091202_MSG0007
rows.name: Being a Landbanker does have its moments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091202_MSG0008
rows.name:
All right, stow the chatter
and let's get to work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091202_MSG0009
rows.name: We can flap gums back at the diner.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091202_MSG0010
rows.name: Right. I'll collect a sample now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091202_MSG0011
rows.name: [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091202_MSG0012
rows.name: Huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091202_JNK0010
rows.name: Express Surprise

rows.label: qev091202_SEL0011
rows.name: Show your shock at the resource vanishing.

rows.label: qev091202_JNK0020
rows.name: Mock

rows.label: qev091202_SEL0021
rows.name: Accuse Fog Christoph of screwing up.

rows.label: qev091202_MSG0013
rows.name: Hey, it disappeared![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091202_MSG0014
rows.name: Don't blame me, Frye. I didn't do anything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091202_MSG0015
rows.name: Yeah, Fog Christoph! What'd ya do?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091202_MSG0015_02
rows.name:
You just dove in and started
muckin' with stuff like always![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091202_MSG0016
rows.name:
I just tried to collect it
in the usual way, Frye![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091202_MSG0017
rows.name:
This is like the time you set off
the fire alarm for no reason.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091202_MSG0018
rows.name:
It was a big red button,
Frye. And I was SEVEN![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091202_MSG0019
rows.name:
It's the same reason I had to climb
the goalpost on the football field.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091202_MSG0019_02
rows.name: 'Cause it was there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091202_MSG0020
rows.name: Heh. I forgot all about that. Good times.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091202_MSG0021_02
rows.name: Anyway![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091202_MSG0021
rows.name:
Enough distractions. This stuff's
already as weird and flighty as you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091202_MSG0022
rows.name: Hell, we should call it phogrium.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091202_MSG0023
rows.name:
Huh. I'd actually love to have a
new discovery named after me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091202_MSG0024
rows.name: That wasn't a compliment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091202_MSG0025
rows.name:
Anyway, it looks like there are other
sources close by. Let's give 'em a try.[ST:wait ]
